text: Lesson 9
zh: 第9课

text: Royal espionage
zh: 王室间谍

text: What important thing did King Alfred learn when he penetrated the Danish camp of Guthrum?
zh: 阿尔弗雷德国王深入古思伦的丹麦营地时,发现了什么重要情报?

text: Alfred the Great acted as his own spy, visiting Danish camps disguised as a minstrel.
zh: 阿尔弗雷德大帝亲自充当间谍,乔装成吟游诗人,潜入丹麦营地打探。

text: In those days wandering minstrels were welcome everywhere.
zh: 在那个年代,流浪的吟游诗人无论走到哪里都受人欢迎。

text: They were not fighting men, and their harp was their passport.
zh: 他们不是战士,一把竖琴就是他们的通行证。

text: Alfred had learned many of their ballads in his youth and could vary his programme with acrobatic tricks and simple conjuring.
zh: 阿尔弗雷德年轻时学过不少民谣,还能穿插些杂耍和简单的戏法,让表演更加丰富多彩。

text: While Alfred's little army slowly began to gather at Athelney, the king himself set out to penetrate the camp of Guthrum, the commander of the Danish invaders.
zh: 当阿尔弗雷德的小股军队正在阿瑟尔尼缓慢集结之时,国王本人却动身潜入丹麦入侵军统帅古思伦的营地。

text: These had settled down for the winter at Chippenham: thither Alfred went.
zh: 这些丹麦人在奇彭纳姆安营过冬,阿尔弗雷德便前往那里。

text: He noticed at once that discipline was slack: the Danes had the self-confidence of conquerors, and their security precautions were casual.
zh: 他很快察觉到丹麦军纪松弛:他们自恃征服者的身份,安保措施十分松懈。

text: They lived well, on the proceeds of raids on neighbouring regions.
zh: 他们靠劫掠周边地区维持优渥的生活。

text: There they collected women as well as food and drink, and a life of ease had made them soft.
zh: 他们不仅抢夺食物和酒水,还掳掠妇女,安逸的生活让他们变得懈怠松散。

text: Alfred stayed in the camp a week before he returned to Athelney.
zh: 阿尔弗雷德在营地里待了一周,才返回阿瑟尔尼。

text: The force there assembled was trivial compared with the Danish horde.
zh: 那里集结的兵力,与丹麦大军相比微不足道。

text: But Alfred had deduced that the Danes were no longer fit for prolonged battle: and that their commissariat had no organization, but depended on irregular raids.
zh: 但阿尔弗雷德已经推断出,丹麦人已不堪长期作战,他们的军需毫无章法,全靠零星劫掠维持。

text: So, faced with the Danish advance, Alfred did not risk open battle but harried the enemy.
zh: 因此,面对丹麦军队的推进,阿尔弗雷德没有冒险正面交战,而是不断骚扰敌军。

text: He was constantly on the move, drawing the Danes after him.
zh: 他行踪不定,四处游走,把丹麦人引得团团转。

text: His patrols halted the raiding parties: hunger assailed the Danish army.
zh: 他的巡逻队拦截了丹麦人的劫掠小队,饥饿开始侵袭丹麦军队。

text: Now Alfred began a long series of skirmishes -- and within a month the Danes had surrendered.
zh: 此后,阿尔弗雷德展开了一连串的小规模交锋——不到一个月,丹麦人便投降了。

text: The episode could reasonably serve as a unique epic of royal espionage!
zh: 这段往事,完全称得上是一部独一无二的王室谍战传奇!
